full_text:
Pei Jing
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pei Jing. Advised Sima Yi to move camp on higher ground but agreed with Sima Yi’s reasons. Pei Jing may not have existed in history. Pei Jing was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
